ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the province belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the province belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the province */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., province, state, territory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the case belongs to */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the province */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the province */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the province */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "case_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-demographic entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the demographic data belongs to */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data the case belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_rates" (
  "case_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case rate entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the case rate belongs to */,
  "cases_per_100k" REAL /* Number of cases per 100,000 population */,
  "deaths_per_100k" REAL /* Number of deaths per 100,000 population */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of COVID-19 cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_rates_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "global_ids" (
  "global_id" TEXT /* Global ID for each case */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the global ID belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("global_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_global_ids_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_global_ids" (
  "case_global_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-global ID entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the global ID belongs to */,
  "global_id" TEXT /* Reference to the global ID the case belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_global_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_global_ids_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_global_ids_global_id FOREIGN KEY ("global_id") REFERENCES global_ids ("global_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the notification belongs to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the subscription belongs to */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of the subscription */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
